submission.author: mrdavtan
submission.name: Non-record: SWA + Doc-Isolated Eval ablation (two negative findings)
submission.blurb: Three controlled runs on fast hardware (44ms/step) testing SWA and doc-isolated eval independently. SWA does not improve int8 quantization under default warmdown (delta +0.0004 BPB, within noise). Doc-isolated eval hurts by 0.009 BPB at stride=64, contradicting the LoRA TTT finding at stride=256. The crossover depends on stride length: at stride=64 context quantity dominates, at stride=256+ context quality dominates.

pr.title: Non-record: SWA and doc-isolated eval ablation — two negative findings at stride=64
